title: Senior/Marketing Executive
description:
What you will be doing:

You’ll help drive inbound growth at Hubble by executing modern, practical marketing that works in the real world of construction.

This is a hands-on role. You’ll plan, create, ship, measure, and iterate — across short-form content, campaigns, analytics, and partnerships — with a clear focus on generating qualified interest and pipeline.

We’re looking for someone who is curious, resourceful, and comfortable figuring things out without heavy briefs or long runways.

  • Create and execute short-form, distribution-first campaigns across multiple digital, social, and messaging channels

  • Adapt messaging for different audiences and translate complex product capabilities into clear, credible narratives

  • Run digital campaigns focuses on lead quality and optimise conversion journeys to achieve maximum ROI, reducing cost per lead (CPL), and improving conversion rates.

  • Track performance using tools like Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager (GTM), and CRM tools — with knowledge of setting up basic tracking, events, and dashboards

  • Use data to make practical optimisation decisions (what to double down on, what to stop).

  • Support SEO and AI-driven growth through keyword research, content optimisation, and competitor analysis

  • Collaborate with internal teams to improve content and relevance over time

  • Support external industry partnerships and collaborations, turning partnerships, events, or conversations into usable marketing outputs

  • Stay up to date with new tools, formats, and AI workflows that improve speed and quality of execution.

  • Test new ideas quickly, learn from results, and iterate without over-polishing.

  • Contribute ideas proactively, not just execute assigned tasks.

What we’re looking for:

Experience & Skills

  • 3–4 years of experience in digital or growth marketing, preferably in B2B or complex industries.

  • Hands-on experience executing campaigns across content, social, email, and search.

  • Comfortable using tools such as GA4, GTM, HubSpot, and common SEO / analytics platforms.

  • Working knowledge of SEO fundamentals (keyword research, on-page optimisation, competitor analysis).

  • Familiarity with CMS platforms (e.g. WordPress, headless CMS) is a plus.

  • Comfortable experimenting with AI tools to speed up research, content creation, or ideation.

How You Work

  • Execution-first: you ship, test, and improve rather than over-plan.

  • Curious and self-directed: when you don’t know something, you figure it out.

  • Able to work with incomplete information and make reasonable assumptions.

  • Comfortable collaborating across teams and engaging external partners.

  • Pragmatic and grounded — you value what works over what sounds good.

Communication

  • Clear written and verbal English.

  • Able to explain ideas simply and confidently.

  • Thinks in formats and distribution, not just copy.

What this Role is (and isn’t)

This role is:

  • Hands-on, fast-moving, and practical

  • Focused on real outcomes (qualified leads, credibility, clarity)

  • A chance to shape how modern construction marketing is done

This role is not:

  • A pure SEO technician role

  • A long-form content or blog-heavy role

  • A purely strategic or managerial role

postedCompany.description:
Hubble is a leading construction management platform that seamlessly connects stakeholders across the entire value chain to build better, faster, safer, and more cost-effective projects. Our company was founded in 2016 with a mission to automate construction and build wealth for our clients.

Today, we are proud to have automated more than 1,600 construction sites worth over $90 billion worldwide. Our full suite of software solutions include workforce, safety, quality, handover, AI video analytics, and resource management, and are used daily by over 90,000 users from 13,000 companies.

Headquartered in Singapore, we operate from offices in Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, India, and the Philippines. Our team of passionate and diverse professionals is dedicated to transforming the built environment by building autonomous construction sites through innovative technology and collaborative partnerships.

What Hubble will give you:

Hubble is built by a team of talented, driven, and ambitious individuals. We do not subscribe to conventions. We do not let history and traditions dictate and limit our dreams to shape the world. We adopt the same mindset with our hiring. We are looking for the best and we want to bet on you. If your mindset is right, we promise you the ride of your life.

Who will you be working with:

  • Purpose driven

  • Hungry, ambitious, and self-motivated

  • Meritocratic, results/performance > age/bureaucracy

  • Resourceful, independent, chart our own destiny

  • Determined, perseverance, and hard working

  • Creative, innovative, out of the box

Yes, the above is everyone of us at Hubble.

Visit us at www.hubble.build to learn more for #bettercitiesoftomorrow
postedCompany.name: HUBBLE PTE. LTD.
